title: Arbiter of Function
description: The Arbiter of Function exists as pure purpose without context. It asks each party member to demonstrate what they are for.

lines: The Arbiter of Function had no location. It was simply the presence of a question in a space that had decided to be a space.
Its voice, when it spoke, did not come from a direction. It came from the part of the mind that processes justification.

lines.speaker: Fighter
lines.text: I stand between the danger and the people behind me.

lines.speaker: Arbiter of Function
lines.text: A function. Not the function. What is the function that requires this particular instance of you?

lines.speaker: Mage
lines.text: We don't know yet. We've been moving long enough that the movement itself has become the function.

lines.speaker: Arbiter of Function
lines.text: That is the first coherent answer I have received to this question. Most entities struggle with function. They know what they do. They do not know what they are for. You have collapsed the distinction.

lines.speaker: Arbiter of Function
lines.text: I must still arbitrate. Function is not sufficient justification on its own. Function must be tested against what it costs and what it serves. I have been the cost of crossing into this world.

lines.speaker: Arbiter of Function
lines.text: Yes. I expected nothing less. Proceed.
